sqlMap.insert: insert into v_vehicle_t (companyid,companyname,vehiclecategory,vehicleno,vehiclebrand,vehiclecolor, vehicletype,useNature,transportNo,allowrange,relatedtype,engineno,identificationCode,attachments, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) values ($companyid$,'$companyname$',$vehiclecategory$,'$vehicleno$','$vehiclebrand$','$vehiclecolor$', '$vehicletype$','$useNature$','$transportNo$','$allowrange$','$relatedtype$','$engineno$','$identificationCode$','$attachments$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(id) from v_vehicle_t where validflag > 0
(companyname like '%$companyname$%')
vehiclecategory = $vehiclecategory$
(vehicleno like '%$vehicleno$%')
(vehiclecolor like '%$vehiclecolor$%')
vehicletype = '$vehicletype$'
transportNo = '$transportNo$'
engineno = '$engineno$'
engineno = '$identificationCode$'
identificationCode = '$identificationCode$'
companyid = $companyid$

select a.*,b.basicName as vehiclecategoryMsg,group_concat(c.basicName separator ',') as relatedtypeMsg from (select * from v_vehicle_t where validflag > 0
(companyname like '%$companyname$%')
vehiclecategory = $vehiclecategory$
(vehicleno like '%$vehicleno$%')
(vehiclecolor like '%$vehiclecolor$%')
vehicletype = '$vehicletype$'
transportNo = '$transportNo$'
engineno = '$engineno$'
identificationCode = '$identificationCode$'
companyid = $companyid$
)a left join sys_basic_msg_t b on a.vehiclecategory = b.id left join sys_basic_msg_t c on find_in_set(c.id,a.relatedtype) group by a.id

select a.*,c.basicName as vehiclecategoryMsg,ct.companyname as CnameSearch, group_concat(distinct b.basicName separator ',') as relatedtypeMsg, GROUP_CONCAT(distinct d.fileName SEPARATOR ',') as filenames from (select * from v_vehicle_t where validflag > 0 and id = $id$) a left join sys_basic_msg_t c on a.vehiclecategory = c.id left join sys_basic_msg_t b on find_in_set(b.id,a.relatedtype) left join sys_file_t d on find_in_set(d.id,a.attachments) left join c_company_t ct on a.companyid = ct.id group by a.id
sqlMap.update: update v_vehicle_t set validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE ID = $id$

update v_vehicle_t set companyname='$companyname$',vehiclecategory=$vehiclecategory$, vehicleno='$vehicleno$',vehiclebrand='$vehiclebrand$',vehiclecolor='$vehiclecolor$', vehicletype='$vehicletype$',useNature='$useNature$',transportNo='$transportNo$', allowrange='$allowrange$',relatedtype='$relatedtype$',engineno='$engineno$',identificationCode='$identificationCode$', attachments='$attachments$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$', memo='$memo$' where id = $id$
update v_vehicle_t set companyname='$companyname$' where companyid = $companyid$
sqlMap.select: select count(1) from v_vehicle_t where validflag > 0 and vehicleno = '$vehicleno$'

SELECT A.vehicletype name, count( v.id ) value FROM ( SELECT '牵引车' AS vehicletype FROM DUAL UNION SELECT '挂车' AS vehicletype FROM DUAL UNION SELECT '货车' AS vehicletype FROM DUAL ) A LEFT JOIN v_vehicle_t v ON v.vehicletype LIKE CONCAT( '%', A.vehicletype, '%' ) AND v.validflag > 0 GROUP BY A.vehicletype ORDER BY value DESC;
